C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 612, EHEWLETT, JUDGE, CGEHLING, CLERK, SWONG, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY MROSSOFF, ESQ, NO APPR FOR DEF DANA BARNETT. WIT SWORN AND EXAMINED. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNETT, DANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET #320, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $805.65 RENT, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,075.65, LEASE FORFEITED
